CustomField.description: The Final EIS section or response-to-comments chapter where this modification is documented. Enables auditors and reviewing courts to locate the agency's written credit attribution in the published document without manually parsing hundreds of pages.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Final EIS chapter/section where this modification and its attributed comments are discussed (e.g., "Chapter 4, Response to Comment C-47").
CustomField.label: Final EIS Section Reference
